allow: Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);p.$queryRaw`SELECT "propertyType", "bedrooms", COUNT\(*\) as cnt, ROUND\(AVG\(price\)\) as avg_price FROM "Listing" WHERE city='\\''Milton'\\'' AND status='\\''sold'\\'' AND "propertyType" IN \('\\''semi'\\'','\\''detached'\\'','\\''condo'\\''\) GROUP BY "propertyType", "bedrooms" ORDER BY "propertyType", "bedrooms"`.then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r,\(_,v\)=>typeof v==='\\''bigint'\\''?Number\(v\):v\)\);p.$disconnect\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e\);p.$disconnect\(\)}\)')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);p.$queryRaw`SELECT "propertyType", "bedrooms", COUNT\(*\) as cnt, ROUND\(AVG\(price\)\) as avg_price FROM "Listing" WHERE city='\\''Milton'\\'' AND "propertyType" IN \('\\''semi'\\'','\\''detached'\\'','\\''condo'\\''\) GROUP BY "propertyType", "bedrooms" ORDER BY "propertyType", "bedrooms"`.then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r,\(_,v\)=>typeof v==='\\''bigint'\\''?Number\(v\):v\)\);p.$disconnect\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e\);p.$disconnect\(\)}\)')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);p.$queryRaw`SELECT "neighbourhood", COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM "Listing" WHERE status='\\''active'\\'' AND city='\\''Milton'\\'' GROUP BY "neighbourhood" ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15`.then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r,\(_,v\)=>typeof v==='\\''bigint'\\''?Number\(v\):v\)\);p.$disconnect\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e\);p.$disconnect\(\)}\)')
